title: Contract C04: Scene List → Image Plan
description: Governs the transition from Stage 6 (Scene List) to Stage 7 (Image Plan). Defines how scenes are mapped to images or video sources, source type decisions, legal status requirements, AI overuse limits, and mandatory human review triggers.

input.description: Fields from scene.json required before image_plan.json production begins.

required_fields.purpose: Each scene becomes at least one image_plan entry. Scenes with multiple shot types may require multiple images.
Image plan requires complete scene coverage. Cannot plan images for an incomplete scene list.
scene.source_type is the primary decision signal for image_plan.source_type. Mapping: STOCK_LICENSED → STOCK_LICENSED; AI_GENERATE → AI_GENERATE; ARCHIVE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN → ARCHIVE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN; etc.
English visual description is used as seed text for AI image prompts.

output.description: What image_plan.json must contain when Stage 7 is complete.

required_fields.purpose: One image entry per unique visual. Multiple scenes may reference the same image (via scene_refs array).
Color palette, aspect ratio, film grain, negative prompts applied to all AI-generated images for visual consistency.
Every image must have a declared legal status. Unchecked legal status is not allowed.
Starts as 'pending'. Changes to 'approved', 'rejected', or 'needs_replacement' during production.

ai_overuse_limit.description: No more than 75% of images may be AI-generated. Above this threshold signals insufficient archival/stock research and increases legal and quality risk.
ai_overuse_limit.current_hashima_status: HIGH — exceeds limit. Review FIX-H1 mandates adding stock_footage_fallback for 5 scenes.

mandatory_human_review_triggers.reason: AI-generated images of sensitive historical events may misrepresent reality. PROMPT_008 rule applies.

mandatory_human_review_triggers.trigger: scene depicts forced labor, wartime abuse, or death
mandatory_human_review_triggers.human_review_criteria: Does the image imply graphic violence, dehumanize victims, or fabricate a historical scene that was not photographed?

fallback_requirements.rule: Every AI_GENERATE image with priority=HIGH must have fallback_image_id set
fallback_requirements.reason: If AI generation fails or produces unusable output, production must not block.

legal_status_constraints.requirement: Must have source documentation (government archive, post-copyright date). Do not assume public domain.
Must document specific CC license version and attribution requirement.
Must document agency and confirm license type covers YouTube commercial use.
Legal status depends on generation tool's terms. Must note tool name in ai_prompt.generation_tool.
Must be resolved before final export. No image with status=REQUIRES_VERIFICATION may appear in approved export.

validation.gate: Image Plan Delivery Gate (end of Stage 7 + Stage 8 prompts)

checks.description: All scenes are referenced by at least one image

checks.action_on_fail: Add stock or archive alternatives for non-sensitive scenes. Prioritize scenes where real photographs exist.

checks.description: All HIGH priority AI images have fallback_image_id
checks.action_on_fail: Identify HIGH priority images without fallback. Assign MOTION_GRAPHICS or stock alternatives.
Set mandatory_human_review=true for all such images.

checks.description: No image has legal_status=REQUIRES_VERIFICATION in final export
checks.action_on_fail: Resolve all REQUIRES_VERIFICATION items. Replace if unresolvable.

checks.description: global_style is populated with at least color_palette and global_negative_prompt
checks.action_on_fail: Add global_style. Without it, AI images may lack visual consistency.

failure_conditions.condition: AI image count > 75% of total images
failure_conditions.human_action: Apply FIX-H1: add stock_footage_fallback column. Research stock for 5 scenes. Reduce AI dependency.

failure_conditions.condition: Sensitive scene with AI_GENERATE lacks mandatory_human_review flag
failure_conditions.human_action: Apply FIX-M1: Add PROMPT_008 mandatory human review gate text to prompt.
Add image entry for uncovered scene. Choose appropriate source_type.

failure_conditions.condition: Image legal status unresolved at export
failure_conditions.human_action: Resolve legal status. If unresolvable, replace with AI_GENERATE or MOTION_GRAPHICS.

recovery_strategy.strategy: Review scene_list for scenes depicting geographic context (maps, satellite imagery), statistical data (motion graphics), or well-documented historical events (government archive photos). Convert these to non-AI source types. Target: reduce AI count to ≤70% for safety margin.

recovery_strategy.scenario: Sensitive AI image without review flag
recovery_strategy.strategy: Identify all images where sensitive_content=true and source_type=AI_GENERATE. Set mandatory_human_review=true. Add human_review_criteria specific to the scene's historical event. Do not generate these images until human approval.

For each HIGH priority AI image: (1) check if scene topic has stock photography from major agencies; (2) if stock is available, add stock_agencies list and set legal_status=STOCK_LICENSED; (3) if no stock, create a motion_graphics alternative with data visualization or title card; (4) set fallback_image_id to reference the alternative.

source_type_decision_guide.STOCK_LICENSED: Prefer for: exterior shots of real locations, aerial views, contemporary footage of accessible places
source_type_decision_guide.AI_GENERATE: Use for: historical reconstruction, interior views of inaccessible ruins, atmospheric establishing shots, symbolic imagery
source_type_decision_guide.MOTION_GRAPHICS: Use for: statistics, timelines, maps, population density visualizations, data that needs to be drawn
source_type_decision_guide.ARCHIVE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN: Use for: pre-1928 photographs, government-produced materials in public domain, openly licensed museum collections
source_type_decision_guide.ARCHIVE_LICENSED: Use for: 20th century historical photographs from press agencies (AP, Reuters, Keystone) — requires licensing
source_type_decision_guide.USER_PROVIDED: Use for: channel owner's original footage

valid_image_entry.human_review_criteria: Does image depict forced labor in a way that is accurate but not graphic? Does it avoid showing identifiable individuals? Does it avoid fabricating specific historical scenes that were not documented?

invalid_image_entry.violation: C04-V04: sensitive_content=true with AI_GENERATE requires mandatory_human_review=true
